description: Fragment from the history of Netira and his sons, as was told by Natan b. Yishak ha-Bavli, from “Akbar Baghdad”. (Information from Gil, Kingdom. Vol. 2, #11). VMR. NB: Gil edits this shelfmark as a join with a fragment published by Harkavy, now lost.
description_he: שרידי תולדות נתירא ובניו, כסיפור שסיפר נתן בן יצחק הבבלי מ-אח'בר בגדד
